results.description: Verify importlib dynamic import and target pipeline script reference.
results.command: spec_count=$(rg -n "importlib.util.spec_from_file_location" scripts/projections/run_pep_projections.py | wc -l); target_count=$(rg -n "02_run_projections.py" scripts/projections/run_pep_projections.py | wc -l); echo "IMPORTLIB_SPEC_COUNT=$spec_count"; echo "PIPELINE_TARGET_REF_COUNT=$target_count"; if [ "$spec_count" -ge 1 ] && [ "$target_count" -ge 1 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
